hero.tagline: Cinematic stories. Crafted frame by frame.
work.title: Selected Work
about.title: About
about.bio: I am Dadan Romadhan — a videographer, photographer, and editor passionate about turning moments into visual stories.
about.tagline: Based in Indonesia — working worldwide. Every project is a chance to tell a story that moves people, captures a moment that can never be recreated, or reveals something unseen.
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.intro: For collaborations, bookings, or just to say hi — drop me an email.
